overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a sunlit futuristic urban street, passing under a concrete overpass, and entering a parked vehicle to speak with an NPC named Stella about a rescue mission.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with metal railings approaching elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward the concrete overpass structure ahead

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway or monorail structure with glass panels spanning across the road ahead
green painted metal barrier separating the sidewalk from the asphalt street
trimmed green hedge running along the right side of the walkway
multi-lane road with yellow dividing lines and a parked white van visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban sidewalk with the camera walking forward toward a massive concrete overpass. Green metal railings line the left side separating the walkway from the street, while a trimmed hedge runs along the right. The environment is empty of pedestrians, with clear blue skies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with concrete stairs on the right

events.description: enters the shadowed area beneath the concrete overpass, transitioning from open sky to covered walkway
exits the shadow of the overpass into bright sunlight, revealing a building with a large yellow mural and palm trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass and emerging into a sunlit plaza area with scattered pedestrians visible ahead

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the ground near the building entrance ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the elevated structure on the right
low-rise building featuring a large yellow banner with a stylized face artwork on the facade
tall palm trees visible in the distance beyond the overpass, indicating a warm climate

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive concrete overpass into shadow, with stairs visible on the right leading upward. Upon emerging from the covered area, bright sunlight reveals a building with a distinctive yellow mural and palm trees in the background. A few pedestrians are seen sitting near the building entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded parking area under building overhang with abandoned vehicle

events.description: slows down and approaches the parked sedan carefully
opens the car door and enters the vehicle interior, shifting perspective to inside the car

agents.ego_description: approaching the parked car and getting into the passenger seat to speak with the occupant

notable_agents.action: woman (Stella) lying reclined in the driver's seat of the parked car, visible through the window

entered.detail: beige and brown four-door sedan with futuristic design parked under the building overhang
thick cylindrical support columns holding up the building structure above the parking area

segments.scene_description: Moving into a shaded area beneath the building overhang, the camera approaches a parked beige sedan. Concrete pillars support the structure overhead. Through the car window, a woman is visible reclining in the driver's seat. The camera moves around the vehicle and enters the passenger side.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of parked vehicle during conversation

events.description: perspective shifts to first-person view from inside the car, showing the futuristic dashboard and interior details
Stella sits up from reclining position and gestures with her hands while explaining her friends are trapped

agents.ego_description: sitting in the passenger seat conversing with Stella who explains that her friends Bill and Charlie are trapped in a building across the street and need rescue from Dodger's men

notable_agents.action: Stella sitting in the driver's seat, animatedly gesturing while explaining the dangerous situation with Dodger's people

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with illuminated blue digital displays and control panels
futuristic steering wheel with integrated controls and metallic accents
upholstered vehicle seats with visible headrests and seatbelt buckles

segments.scene_description: Now inside the vehicle, the camera shows the futuristic car interior with blue-lit dashboard displays. Stella, seated in the driver's seat, sits up and gestures while explaining that her friends are trapped in a building across the street and warns about the danger from Dodger's men. Sunlight streams through the windows illuminating the conversation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open urban sidewalk into the intimate, high-tech interior of a parked vehicle. It begins by walking forward along a sunlit path bordered by green metal railings and trimmed hedges toward a massive concrete overpass. As the camera passes under the overpass into deep shadow, it emerges back into the light to reveal a building adorned with a yellow mural and distant palm trees. The scene then shifts into the shade of a building overhang, where the camera approaches a beige sedan and moves from the concrete pillars outside into the passenger seat. Finally, the perspective settles inside the futuristic cabin, where blue-lit dashboard displays glow as Stella gestures and speaks while sunlight streams through the windows.
